allow: Bash(powershell "Get-Service AmneziaVPN-service | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, Status, StartType")
Bash(powershell "Get-Service AmneziaWGManager | Select-Object Name, DisplayName, Status, StartType")
Bash(powershell "Get-NetAdapter -Name 'viktorwg22' | Select-Object Name, InterfaceDescription, Status, IfIndex")
Bash(powershell "Get-Process | Select-Object Name, Id, Path | findstr /i amnezia")
Bash(powershell "Get-Process | Select-Object Name, Id, Path | findstr /i wireguard")
Bash(powershell "Get-Service | Select-Object Name, DisplayName | findstr /i 'service' | head -20")
